name: CAPRICOR THERAPEUTICS, INC.
summary: Capricor Therapeutics, Inc. is a Delaware-based biotechnology company focused on developing cell and exosome-based therapeutics for Duchenne muscular dystrophy (DMD) and other diseases with significant unmet medical need. Its lead product candidate, Deramiocel, is a cardiosphere-derived cell (CDC) therapy with a BLA under FDA review (PDUFA date: August 22, 2026). The company also advances its exosome platform (StealthX) for infectious diseases, monogenic diseases, and other indications through collaborations with NIH, DoD, Johns Hopkins, and others.
